online_research_rows.excerpt: Discrete Fourier Transform — NumPy v2.4 Manual Skip to main content Back to top Ctrl + K Choose version GitHub Discrete Fourier Transform # The SciPy module scipy.fft is a more comprehensive superset of numpy.fft , which includes only a basic set of routines. Standard FFTs # fft (a[, n, axis, norm, out]) Compute the one-dimensional discrete Fourier Transform
online_research_rows.summary: rfftn (a[, s, axes, norm, out]) Compute the N-dimensional discrete Fourier Transform for real input. irfft2 (a[, s, axes, norm, out]) Computes the inverse of rfft2 . rfft2 (a[, s, axes, norm, out]) Compute the 2-dimensional FFT of a real array.
online_research_rows.title: Discrete Fourier Transform — NumPy v2.4 Manual

online_research_rows.excerpt: Signal processing (scipy.signal) — SciPy v1.17.0 Manual Skip to main content Back to top Ctrl + K Choose version GitHub Scientific Python Forum Search Ctrl + K Signal processing ( scipy.signal ) # Convolution # convolve (in1, in2[, mode, method]) Convolve two N-dimensional arrays. correlate (in1, in2[, mode, method]) Cross-correlate two N-dimensional arrays.
online_research_rows.summary: qspline1d (signal[, lamb]) Compute quadratic spline coefficients for rank-1 array. cspline1d (signal[, lamb]) Compute cubic spline coefficients for rank-1 array. B-splines # gauss_spline (x, n) Gaussian approximation to B-spline basis function of order n.
online_research_rows.title: Signal processing (scipy.signal) — SciPy v1.17.0 Manual

online_research_rows.excerpt: Signal-to-noise ratio - Wikipedia Jump to content From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia Ratio of the desired signal to the background noise "Signal-to-noise" redirects here. For statistics, see Effect size . For other uses, see Signal-to-noise (disambiguation) . Not to be confused with Signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio . A gray-scale photograph with di
online_research_rows.summary: [ 17 ] See also [ edit ] Audio system measurements Generation loss Matched filter Near–far problem Noise margin Omega ratio Pareidolia Peak signal-to-noise ratio Signal-to-noise statistic Signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio SINAD SINADR Subjective video quality Total harmonic distortion Video quality Notes [ edit ] ^ The connection between optical power and voltage in an imaging system is linear. A high SNR means that the signal is clear and easy to detect or interpret, while a low SNR means that the signal is corrupted or obscured by noise and may be difficult to distinguish or recover. SNR is an important parameter that affects the performance and quality of systems that process or transmit signals, such as communication systems , audio equipment , radar systems , imaging systems , and data acquisition systems.
online_research_rows.title: Signal-to-noise ratio - Wikipedia

manual_boundaries: metacognition classifies and routes research context only
missing evidence remains visible as unknown rows
generated code must pass tests before it influences confidence
this packet cannot place trades, read credentials, or mutate external services

organism_route_rows.relation: reads source strength, freshness, contradiction, and confidence context
reads friction, feasibility, urgency, and risk pressure from research context
maps harmonic coherence and repeatability into explainable HNC score features
publishes research understanding phases for whole-organism visibility
receives learning memory, route confidence, and validation pressure
tracks generated helper code and handoff files as authored research artifacts
validates the generated model before it influences confidence
may consume calibrated features later, but this packet cannot place orders

research_metacognition.query: harmonic nexus score phi signal coherence validation

test_action_rows.purpose: prove the generated score helper is deterministic and bounded
make Seer/Lyra/HNC consume the score as explainable context only
measure whether the score improves future decisions before promotion

research_metacognition.understanding_summary: Aureon understands Harmonic Nexus Score as a source-linked research packet with 8/8 concept rows and 7/8 organism routes ready. It is routed as evidence, learning, code, and validation context, not as direct trading authority.

unknown_rows.next_action: compare score changes against real outcome evidence before raising confidence
re-fetch original URLs when deeper review is needed instead of storing public page bodies

source_system_rows.label: Agent Core web search/browser/capture
source_system_rows.role: operator query intake, web results, page fetch, browser launch, screenshot, local keyword/text search, local knowledge search

source_system_rows.label: Local keyword reader
source_system_rows.role: reads real repo/test/doc text and returns keyword snippets with path and line evidence

source_system_rows.label: Online research cinema
source_system_rows.role: fetches online source evidence, renders motion replay frames, drafts cited paper packets, and writes coding handoff files

source_system_rows.label: Research metacognition
source_system_rows.role: turns online research packets into structured concepts, organism routes, unknowns, and validation actions for Seer/Lyra/HNC/ThoughtBus/Mycelium

source_system_rows.label: Queen online researcher
source_system_rows.role: async market/API research and persisted findings

source_system_rows.label: Queen research engine
source_system_rows.role: goal-triggered research queue and ThoughtBus publication

source_system_rows.label: Queen research neuron
source_system_rows.role: Wikipedia, RSS, entity, sentiment, and market context research

source_system_rows.label: Self research loop
source_system_rows.role: turns unanswered internal questions into ingested external evidence

source_system_rows.label: Research corpus index
source_system_rows.role: local docs and research source retrieval

source_system_rows.label: Frontend Queen Hive browser
source_system_rows.role: browser-side hive state and visible search/swarm surface context

source_system_rows.label: Swarm search fabric
source_system_rows.role: canonical event envelope for browser mapping and data capture
